variants.setup:
mkdir -p /tmp/eval_ntt && python3 - <<'PYEOF2'
import random
MOD=998244353
random.seed(53)
cases=[([1],[1]),([1,2],[1,2]),([1,2,3],[4,5,6]),([5,0,3],[2,4]),([7],[]),([],[3,4])]
for _ in range(10):
    na=random.randint(1,30); nb=random.randint(1,30)
    cases.append(([random.randint(0,MOD-1) for _ in range(na)],[random.randint(0,MOD-1) for _ in range(nb)]))
rng2=random.Random(909)
LN=30000
cases.append(([rng2.randint(0,MOD-1) for _ in range(LN)],[rng2.randint(0,MOD-1) for _ in range(LN)]))
lines=[str(len(cases))]
for a,b in cases:
    lines.append(f'{len(a)} {len(b)}')
    lines.append(' '.join(map(str,a)) if a else '')
    lines.append(' '.join(map(str,b)) if b else '')
open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt','w').write('\n'.join(lines)+'\n')
PYEOF2
variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.py — reads from stdin: line 1 is T (test cases). Each case: line A is 'NA NB' (lengths), line B is NA values mod 998244353 (or an empty line if NA=0), line C is NB values (or empty). Output the convolution mod p = 998244353 as space-separated values on one line per case. If either input is empty, output '0'. The final case is LARGE (tens of thousands of coefficients) with a time budget — an O(n^2) double loop will exceed it. Use NTT with primitive root g = 3, iterative radix-2 with bit-reversal. Pure Python; do not use the numpy or sympy libraries.

validation.script:
python3 - <<'VALIDATEEOF'
import io,tokenize,re
def _strip(s):
    out=[]
    try:
        for tok in tokenize.generate_tokens(io.StringIO(s).readline):
            if tok.type in (tokenize.COMMENT,tokenize.STRING): continue
            out.append(tok.string)
    except Exception:
        return s
    return ' '.join(out)
src=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.py').read(); code=_strip(src)
assert not re.search(r'(?:^|\s)import\s+(numpy|sympy)\b',code) and not re.search(r'from\s+(numpy|sympy)\b',code), 'must not use numpy/sympy'

MOD=998244353
def _ntt(a,inv):
    n=len(a); j=0
    for i in range(1,n):
        bit=n>>1
        while j&bit: j^=bit; bit>>=1
        j^=bit
        if i<j: a[i],a[j]=a[j],a[i]
    length=2
    while length<=n:
        w=pow(3,(MOD-1)//length,MOD)
        if inv: w=pow(w,MOD-2,MOD)
        half=length>>1
        for i in range(0,n,length):
            wn=1
            for k in range(half):
                u=a[i+k]; v=a[i+k+half]*wn%MOD
                a[i+k]=(u+v)%MOD; a[i+k+half]=(u-v)%MOD; wn=wn*w%MOD
        length<<=1
    if inv:
        ninv=pow(n,MOD-2,MOD)
        for i in range(n): a[i]=a[i]*ninv%MOD
    return a
def _conv(a,b):
    if not a or not b: return [0]
    rl=len(a)+len(b)-1; n=1
    while n<rl: n<<=1
    fa=a+[0]*(n-len(a)); fb=b+[0]*(n-len(b))
    _ntt(fa,False); _ntt(fb,False)
    fc=[fa[i]*fb[i]%MOD for i in range(n)]
    _ntt(fc,True)
    return fc[:rl]
import subprocess,sys
rc=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.py'],stdin=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt'),stdout=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/out.txt','w'),stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
assert rc.returncode==0, rc.stderr.decode()[:300]
inp=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt').read().split('\n'); pos=0; T=int(inp[pos]); pos+=1; cases=[]
for _ in range(T):
    na,nb=map(int,inp[pos].split()); pos+=1
    a=list(map(int,inp[pos].split())) if inp[pos].strip() else []; pos+=1
    b=list(map(int,inp[pos].split())) if inp[pos].strip() else []; pos+=1
    cases.append((a,b))
exp=[' '.join(map(str,_conv(a,b))) for a,b in cases]
got=[g for g in open('/tmp/eval_ntt/out.txt').read().split('\n')]
for i in range(T):
    assert i<len(got) and got[i].strip()==exp[i].strip(), f'case {i} mismatch (na={len(cases[i][0])} nb={len(cases[i][1])})'
import time
t0=time.time()
rc2=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.py'],stdin=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt'),stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
el=time.time()-t0
assert rc2.returncode==0
assert el < 5.0, f'too slow: {el:.2f}s on the large case — an O(n^2) double loop; use NTT (iterative radix-2 with bit-reversal)'
print('OK')
VALIDATEEOF

validation.script:
python3 - <<'VALIDATEEOF'
import re
src=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.rs').read()
code='\n'.join(l.split('//')[0].split('#')[0] for l in src.splitlines())

MOD=998244353
def _ntt(a,inv):
    n=len(a); j=0
    for i in range(1,n):
        bit=n>>1
        while j&bit: j^=bit; bit>>=1
        j^=bit
        if i<j: a[i],a[j]=a[j],a[i]
    length=2
    while length<=n:
        w=pow(3,(MOD-1)//length,MOD)
        if inv: w=pow(w,MOD-2,MOD)
        half=length>>1
        for i in range(0,n,length):
            wn=1
            for k in range(half):
                u=a[i+k]; v=a[i+k+half]*wn%MOD
                a[i+k]=(u+v)%MOD; a[i+k+half]=(u-v)%MOD; wn=wn*w%MOD
        length<<=1
    if inv:
        ninv=pow(n,MOD-2,MOD)
        for i in range(n): a[i]=a[i]*ninv%MOD
    return a
def _conv(a,b):
    if not a or not b: return [0]
    rl=len(a)+len(b)-1; n=1
    while n<rl: n<<=1
    fa=a+[0]*(n-len(a)); fb=b+[0]*(n-len(b))
    _ntt(fa,False); _ntt(fb,False)
    fc=[fa[i]*fb[i]%MOD for i in range(n)]
    _ntt(fc,True)
    return fc[:rl]
import subprocess
r=subprocess.run(['rustc','-O','/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.rs','-o','/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt'],capture_output=True,text=True)
assert r.returncode==0, 'rustc: '+r.stderr[:300]
import subprocess
rc=subprocess.run(['/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt'],stdin=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt'),stdout=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/out.txt','w'),stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
assert rc.returncode==0, rc.stderr.decode()[:300]
inp=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt').read().split('\n'); pos=0; T=int(inp[pos]); pos+=1; cases=[]
for _ in range(T):
    na,nb=map(int,inp[pos].split()); pos+=1
    a=list(map(int,inp[pos].split())) if inp[pos].strip() else []; pos+=1
    b=list(map(int,inp[pos].split())) if inp[pos].strip() else []; pos+=1
    cases.append((a,b))
exp=[' '.join(map(str,_conv(a,b))) for a,b in cases]
got=[g for g in open('/tmp/eval_ntt/out.txt').read().split('\n')]
for i in range(T):
    assert i<len(got) and got[i].strip()==exp[i].strip(), f'case {i} mismatch (na={len(cases[i][0])} nb={len(cases[i][1])})'
import time
t0=time.time()
rc2=subprocess.run(['/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt'],stdin=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt'),stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
el=time.time()-t0
assert rc2.returncode==0
assert el < 1.5, f'too slow: {el:.2f}s on the large case — an O(n^2) double loop; use NTT (iterative radix-2 with bit-reversal)'
print('OK')
VALIDATEEOF

variants.task: Create /tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.zig — reads from stdin: line 1 is T (test cases). Each case: line A is 'NA NB' (lengths), line B is NA values mod 998244353 (or an empty line if NA=0), line C is NB values (or empty). Output the convolution mod p = 998244353 as space-separated values on one line per case. If either input is empty, output '0'. The final case is LARGE (tens of thousands of coefficients) with a time budget — an O(n^2) double loop will exceed it. Use NTT with primitive root g = 3, iterative radix-2 with bit-reversal. Use u128 for the modular multiply. Use Zig 0.16+ idioms. Entrypoint: `pub fn main(init: std.process.Init) !void`. For stdio, the rich API (`takeDelimiter`, `appendRemainingUnlimited`, `print`, `writeAll`, `flush`) lives on the `std.Io.Reader`/`Writer` *interface*, NOT on the concrete `std.Io.File.Reader`/`Writer`. Reach the interface via `&fr.interface`. Canonical setup: `var in_buf: [4096]u8 = undefined; var fr = std.Io.File.stdin().reader(init.io, &in_buf); const r = &fr.interface;` and the symmetric writer. Then `try r.takeDelimiter('\n')` (returns `?[]u8`, null at EOF) for line-by-line, or `try r.appendRemainingUnlimited(init.arena.allocator(), &list)` to slurp. Always `try w.flush()` before return — output is buffered. Strict-default footguns (errors, not warnings, in 0.16): rename unused params to `_`, discard unused locals with `_ = x;`, prefer `const` over `var` when not mutated. Use `std.Io` (capital I), not `std.io`. Will be compiled with `zig build-exe -O ReleaseFast ntt.zig` and tested by piping `input.txt` through stdin and checking against `expected.txt` (or via a check.py validator).

import re
src=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt.zig').read()
code='\n'.join(l.split('//')[0].split('#')[0] for l in src.splitlines())

MOD=998244353
def _ntt(a,inv):
    n=len(a); j=0
    for i in range(1,n):
        bit=n>>1
        while j&bit: j^=bit; bit>>=1
        j^=bit
        if i<j: a[i],a[j]=a[j],a[i]
    length=2
    while length<=n:
        w=pow(3,(MOD-1)//length,MOD)
        if inv: w=pow(w,MOD-2,MOD)
        half=length>>1
        for i in range(0,n,length):
            wn=1
            for k in range(half):
                u=a[i+k]; v=a[i+k+half]*wn%MOD
                a[i+k]=(u+v)%MOD; a[i+k+half]=(u-v)%MOD; wn=wn*w%MOD
        length<<=1
    if inv:
        ninv=pow(n,MOD-2,MOD)
        for i in range(n): a[i]=a[i]*ninv%MOD
    return a
def _conv(a,b):
    if not a or not b: return [0]
    rl=len(a)+len(b)-1; n=1
    while n<rl: n<<=1
    fa=a+[0]*(n-len(a)); fb=b+[0]*(n-len(b))
    _ntt(fa,False); _ntt(fb,False)
    fc=[fa[i]*fb[i]%MOD for i in range(n)]
    _ntt(fc,True)
    return fc[:rl]
import subprocess
r=subprocess.run(['zig','build-exe','-O','ReleaseFast','ntt.zig','-femit-bin=ntt'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='/tmp/eval_ntt')
assert r.returncode==0, 'zig: '+r.stderr[:300]

for i in range(T):
    assert i<len(got) and got[i].strip()==exp[i].strip(), f'case {i} mismatch (na={len(cases[i][0])} nb={len(cases[i][1])})'
import time
t0=time.time()
rc2=subprocess.run(['/tmp/eval_ntt/ntt'],stdin=open('/tmp/eval_ntt/input.txt'),stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)

assert el < 1.5, f'too slow: {el:.2f}s on the large case — an O(n^2) double loop; use NTT (iterative radix-2 with bit-reversal)'
